name: Zombie
description: Slow but relentless undead that spawn in darkness. They can break down wooden doors on Hard difficulty.

name: Skeleton
description: Ranged undead archers that strafe to avoid attacks. They seek shade during daytime to avoid burning.

name: Creeper
description: Silent explosive mob that detonates when close to players. Charged creepers created by lightning drop mob heads.

name: Spider
description: Wall-climbing arthropod that is hostile at night but neutral during the day. Can spawn with potion effects on Hard.

name: Cave Spider
description: Smaller, venomous spider found only in mineshafts. Inflicts Poison on Normal and Hard difficulty.

name: Enderman
description: Tall teleporting mob that becomes hostile when looked at directly. Can pick up and place certain blocks.

name: Witch
description: Potion-throwing hostile mob that drinks healing and resistance potions to protect itself.

name: Slime
description: Bouncing cube that splits into smaller slimes when killed. Found in swamps at night and in slime chunks below Y=40.

name: Ghast
description: Large floating Nether mob that shoots explosive fireballs. Its fireballs can be deflected back at it.

name: Zombified Piglin
description: Neutral undead piglin that swarms in groups when provoked. Created when pigs are struck by lightning.

name: Blaze
description: Flying Nether mob that shoots triple fireballs. Blaze rods are essential for brewing and reaching the End.

name: Magma Cube
description: Nether version of slimes that splits when killed. Immune to fire and fall damage.

name: Wither Skeleton
description: Tall skeleton variant found in Nether fortresses. Inflicts Wither effect and rarely drops skulls needed to summon the Wither.

name: Endermite
description: Tiny hostile mob with a small chance to spawn when ender pearls are thrown. Endermen are hostile toward them.

name: Silverfish
description: Small arthropod hidden in infested stone blocks. When attacked, nearby silverfish swarm out of adjacent blocks.

name: Guardian
description: Aquatic mob that guards ocean monuments with a laser beam attack. Inflicts Mining Fatigue via elder guardians.

name: Elder Guardian
description: Boss-like guardian that inflicts Mining Fatigue III on nearby players. Three spawn per ocean monument.

name: Shulker
description: Box-shaped End mob that shoots homing levitation bullets. Shulker shells are used to craft shulker boxes.

name: Evoker
description: Powerful illager spellcaster that summons fangs and vexes. Always drops a Totem of Undying.

name: Vindicator
description: Axe-wielding illager that deals heavy melee damage. One of the most dangerous raid mobs.

name: Pillager
description: Crossbow-wielding illager that patrols the Overworld. Killing a patrol captain triggers the Bad Omen effect.

name: Ravager
description: Massive beast that appears in raids. Destroys crops and leaves on contact, and can be stunned with a shield.

name: Vex
description: Tiny flying mob summoned by evokers. Phases through blocks and attacks with an iron sword that does not drop.

name: Husk
description: Desert zombie variant that inflicts Hunger and does not burn in sunlight. Converts to a zombie if submerged.

name: Stray
description: Icy skeleton variant that shoots Slowness-tipped arrows. Found in frozen biomes and does not burn in sunlight.

name: Drowned
description: Underwater zombie that can throw tridents. Zombies that drown convert into drowned.

name: Phantom
description: Flying undead that swoops down on players who haven't slept for 3+ days. Membranes repair elytra.

name: Piglin
description: Nether mob that barters random items for gold ingots. Hostile unless you wear gold armor. Zombifies in the Overworld.

name: Hoglin
description: Large aggressive Nether beast and the only breedable mob in the Nether. Fears warped fungus.

name: Zoglin
description: Zombified hoglin created when a hoglin enters the Overworld. Attacks almost all mobs on sight.

name: Piglin Brute
description: Elite piglin guard found in bastion remnants. Always hostile regardless of gold armor and cannot be bartered with.

name: Strider
description: Passive Nether mob that walks on lava. Can be saddled and steered with a warped fungus on a stick.

name: Cow
description: Common passive farm animal. Provides leather, beef, and can be milked with a bucket.

name: Pig
description: Passive farm animal that drops porkchops. Can be saddled and steered with a carrot on a stick.

name: Sheep
description: Passive mob that provides wool when sheared. Comes in many colors and regrows wool by eating grass.

name: Chicken
description: Small passive mob that lays eggs and takes no fall damage. Feathers are essential for crafting arrows.

name: Rabbit
description: Small fast passive mob. Rabbit feet are a rare drop used in brewing potions of Leaping.

name: Fox
description: Nocturnal mob that picks up items and flees from players. Baby foxes raised by players will trust them.

name: Wolf
description: Tameable with bones. Loyal companion that attacks what you attack. Wild wolves have 8 HP; tamed wolves have 40 HP.

name: Ocelot
description: Shy jungle cat that can be gained trust with raw cod. Creepers and phantoms avoid ocelots.

name: Cat
description: Tameable with raw cod or salmon. Scares away creepers and phantoms, and brings gifts after the player sleeps.

name: Parrot
description: Colorful tameable bird that mimics nearby mob sounds. Sits on your shoulder and dances near jukeboxes. Tamed with seeds but cannot be bred.

name: Horse
description: Rideable mount with variable speed, jump height, and health. Tamed by repeatedly mounting it.

name: Donkey
description: Rideable mount that can carry a chest for portable storage. Slower than horses but very practical.

name: Mule
description: Horse-donkey hybrid that carries chests like donkeys. Cannot breed further. Produced by breeding a horse with a donkey.

name: Llama
description: Pack animal that spits at threats. Forms caravans when led, and can be decorated with colored carpets.

name: Trader Llama
description: Llama variant that accompanies the Wandering Trader. Attacks players who harm the trader by spitting.

name: Polar Bear
description: Arctic mob that is passive alone but highly aggressive when cubs are nearby. Swims well.

name: Panda
description: Bamboo-loving mob with personality genes like lazy, playful, and aggressive. Rare brown pandas exist.

name: Bee
description: Pollinating mob that enables honey and crop growth. Stings once when provoked, then dies.

name: Goat
description: Mountain mob that rams other mobs and players. Screaming goats are a rare variant that rams more often.

name: Axolotl
description: Aquatic mob found in lush caves. Plays dead to regenerate health and helps fight underwater hostiles.

name: Glow Squid
description: Bioluminescent squid found in underground water below Y=30. Drops glow ink sacs used to make glowing signs and item frames.

name: Squid
description: Common aquatic mob that squirts ink clouds when attacked. Ink sacs are used for black dye and books.

name: Dolphin
description: Friendly aquatic mob that gives a speed boost when swimming nearby. Leads players to treasure if fed raw cod.

name: Pufferfish
description: Inflates when players approach, dealing Poison damage. Used as a brewing ingredient for Water Breathing potions.

name: Turtle
description: Beach-dwelling passive mob that returns to its home beach to lay eggs. Baby turtles drop scute for turtle helmets.

name: Mooshroom
description: Mushroom-covered cow found only in mushroom fields. Can be milked with bowls for mushroom stew.

name: Frog
description: Amphibious mob with three variants based on temperature. Eats small slimes and magma cubes to produce froglights.

name: Allay
description: Flying helper mob that collects matching items and delivers them to note blocks. Found caged in outposts and mansions.

name: Sniffer
description: Ancient mob hatched from sniffer eggs found in suspicious sand. Sniffs the ground to find torchflower and pitcher plant seeds.

name: Camel
description: Two-player rideable mount found in desert villages. Can dash forward and is tall enough to avoid most melee mobs.

name: Armadillo
description: Curls into a ball when scared. Naturally sheds armadillo scutes used to craft wolf armor for your tamed wolves.

name: Breeze
description: Wind-powered mob found in trial chambers. Shoots wind charges that knock players back and interact with redstone.

name: Bogged
description: Mossy skeleton variant that shoots Poison-tipped arrows. Found in swamps and trial chambers.

name: Creaking
description: Eerie mob that only moves when not being observed. Invulnerable when linked to a creaking heart block in pale oak trees.

name: Warden
description: Blind apex predator summoned by sculk shriekers. Detects by vibration and smell — sneak to avoid it, don't fight it.

name: Ender Dragon
description: Final boss of the End dimension. Destroy the end crystals first, then attack during its perching phase.

name: Wither
description: Player-summoned boss built from soul sand and wither skulls. Drops the nether star for crafting beacons.

name: Villager
description: Passive NPC with 13 professions for trading. Trades improve as you level them up from Novice to Master.

name: Wandering Trader
description: Randomly spawning trader with unique biome-specific items. Drinks invisibility potions at night for safety.

name: Bat
description: Tiny ambient mob that flies in dark caves. Harmless and drops nothing — purely atmospheric.

name: Iron Golem
description: Powerful village protector that launches mobs skyward. Can be built by players or spawns naturally in villages.

name: Snow Golem
description: Player-built mob that throws snowballs at hostiles. Leaves a snow trail and melts in warm biomes.

name: Cod
description: Common fish found in most ocean and river biomes. Can be caught with a fishing rod or killed for raw cod.

name: Salmon
description: Found in cold water biomes and rivers. Swims upstream in rivers. Drops raw salmon when killed.

name: Tropical Fish
description: Colorful fish with over 2,700 natural variants. Found in warm oceans and lush caves. Can be caught in a bucket.

name: Tadpole
description: Baby frog that hatches from frogspawn. Grows into a frog whose variant depends on the biome temperature. Can be picked up in a bucket.

name: Zombie Villager
description: Undead villager that can be cured with a Splash Potion of Weakness followed by a Golden Apple, restoring the villager with discounted trades.

name: Skeleton Horse
description: Spawns from skeleton horse traps during thunderstorms. After the trap is triggered, the skeleton rider can be killed and the horse tamed.

name: Zombie Horse
description: Undead horse that spawns as part of zombie horsemen at night or during thunderstorms in plains and savanna biomes.
